description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint and a large, dark brown gable roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or cream color, complemented by a combination of stone and wood accents, especially around the base and entryway. The property is enclosed by a fence with vertical brown panels and white posts, and features a spacious driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. The house has several windows of varying sizes, arranged asymmetrically, and a main entrance sheltered by a roof overhang supported by columns. The surrounding yard is mostly grass, with paved walkways and a large paved area in front of the house, likely for parking or outdoor activities.
description: A single-story, L-shaped house with a dark brown gable roof, beige walls, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway and carport. The design includes stone and wood accents, asymmetrical windows, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, and large paved driveway with the fenced yard in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped layout, rear yard, and the main entryway under the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, the back of the house, and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Angled view from the carport side, showing the covered parking area, side entrance, and the stone-accented fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, supported by columns, featuring a single door and a roof overhang.
